Landing.headline: Stop chasing your clients for documents.
Landing.subhead: A simple, bilingual client portal built for small Canadian accounting and bookkeeping firms.
Landing.feature_1_body: Pick a template (T1, T2, bookkeeping), send a magic link. Your clients log in to nothing.
Landing.feature_2_body: We nudge your clients on your behalf, at the right time, in French or English.
Landing.feature_3_body: Catch when a client uploads the wrong slip before it costs you an hour of email back-and-forth.

Auth.forgot_subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
Auth.reset_subtitle: Choose a new password for your account.
Auth.name: Your name

errors.email_taken: An account already exists with this email.
errors.signup_failed: Couldn't create the account. Please try again.
errors.reset_sent: If that email exists, a reset link is on its way.
errors.reset_failed: The link is invalid or expired. Please request a new one.

Onboarding.step1_subtitle: A few details about your firm to personalize the client portal.
Onboarding.step2_subtitle: Timezone and default language for emails sent to your clients.
Onboarding.step3_subtitle: Optional. You can also do this later in settings.
Onboarding.step3_invites_pending: Invites will be sent once that feature ships (coming soon).

Clients.add_subtitle: Add a new client to your list.
Clients.import_subtitle: Paste a CSV or upload a file exported from your accounting software.
Clients.import_columns_hint: Accepted columns (headers): name (required), email, phone, type (individual/business), language (fr/en), external_ref, notes.
